title: Thesis Title
text:
Declaration
I declare that this document is an original work of my own authorship and that it fulfills all the requirements of the Code of Conduct and Good Practices of the Universidade de Lisboa.


Declaração
Declaro que o presente documento é um trabalho original da minha autoria e que cumpre todos os requisitos do Código de Conduta e Boas Práticas da Universidade de Lisboa.


AI Usage Disclosure
I disclose that I have employed Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools to assist in the writing of this thesis. Namely, to gather papers for the literature review (Elicit, 2023; Elsevier, 2024) and for textual and code review (GitHub, 2021; OpenAI, 2023). All content generated by these tools has been reviewed and edited by me to ensure accuracy and originality. I acknowledge the assistance provided by these tools while affirming that the intellectual content and analysis presented in this thesis are my own work.


Declaração Sobre Utilização de IA
Declaro que utilizei ferramentas de Inteligência Artificial (IA) para auxiliar na elaboração desta dissertação. Nomeadamente, para a compilação de artigos para a revisão da literatura (Elicit, 2023; Elsevier, 2024) e para a revisão textual e de código (GitHub, 2021; OpenAI, 2023). Todo o conteúdo gerado por estas ferramentas foi revisto e editado por mim de forma a garantir o seu rigor e originalidade. Reconheço o auxílio prestado por estas ferramentas, salvaguardando, no entanto, que o conteúdo intelectual e a análise apresentados nesta tese são da minha própria autoria.





Elicit. (2023). Elicit: The AI research assistant [Computer software]. https://elicit.com


Elsevier. (2024). Scopus AI [Computer software]. https://www.scopus.com/pages/ai


GitHub. (2021). GitHub copilot [Computer software]. https://github.com/features/copilot


OpenAI. (2023). ChatGPT [Computer software]. https://chat.openai.com/chat

title: 1  Introduction
text:
1.3 Structure of the Work
This work is structured in six chapters. After this introduction that explains the motivation, objectives and structure, the second chapter dives into the existing literature to set the theoretical framework..
The third chapter describes the methodology applied in this research…
Results are presented in chapter four…
Chapter six combines these findings, relating them to the literature and interpreting their implications for network monitoring and planning.
Finally, the seventh chapter concludes this thesis, summarizing the main contributions, acknowledging its limitations, and suggesting directions for future research.

title: Appendix A — Lorem Ipsum Appendix
text:
A.1.1 Subsection One

# Load necessary library
library(ggplot2)

# Create a simple data frame
data <- data.frame(
    category = c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
    value = c(10, 20, 15, 25)
)

# Plot the data
ggplot(data, aes(x = category, y = value, fill = category)) +
    geom_col() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Simple Bar Chart", x = "Category", y = "Value")



A.1.2 Subsection Two

# A simple summary of a built-in dataset
summary(cars)

# A simple linear model and plot
model <- lm(dist ~ speed, data = cars)
plot(cars$speed, cars$dist, main = "Speed vs Distance")
abline(model, col = "red")
